I am a Data Science student at UET Lahore who loves turning raw data into meaningful insights. I am at the beginning of my journey but I learn fast, work hard, and I am already doing real analysis and visualization work at my internship.

// 01. about me

Who I Am

I am a 2nd semester Data Science student at UET Lahore (2025–2029), currently gaining real experience as a Data Science Intern at Developers Hub Corporation.

At my internship I perform data analysis, data cleaning, and data visualization tasks on real datasets — creating charts and reports that communicate findings clearly to the team.

I am also building GigLens — a desktop application using C# OOP with a SQL database backend — my biggest independent project so far.

📍 Location: Lahore, Punjab, Pakistan
🎓 University: UET Lahore — BSDS 2025–2029
📧 Email: sanashabir2233@gmail.com

// 02. internship

Real Work Experience

Data Science Intern
Developers Hub Corporation · Lahore, Pakistan
2025 – Present
  • Perform data analysis tasks on real structured datasets to identify trends and patterns
  • Clean and organise raw data — handling missing values and fixing inconsistencies using Python and Pandas
  • Create data visualizations including bar charts, line plots, and scatter plots using Matplotlib and Seaborn
  • Prepare visual reports to communicate data findings clearly to the team
  • Attend Agile team meetings and contribute to sprint tasks under supervisor guidance

// 03. projects

Featured Projects

PROJECT_01
GigLens — Workforce Analyzer
In Progress

Desktop application built with C# OOP and a SQL database backend. Analyzes 45K+ gig economy job records with live search, filter, dashboard stats, and CSV export.

C# OOPSQLDesktop App
PROJECT_02
Pakistan Demographics Dashboard
Completed

Interactive Power BI dashboard showing Pakistan population trends (1955–2050). Includes province/district slicers, urban vs rural charts, and population growth visualization.

Power BIData ModelingMS Excel
🐙 GitHub
PROJECT_03
University Management System
Completed

Console CRUD app managing students, degree programs, subject registration, merit generation and fee calculation using OOP — encapsulation, inheritance, polymorphism.

C# OOPCRUD
🐙 GitHub
[ CUSTOMER CHURN ANALYSIS ]
PROJECT_04
Customer Churn Analysis
Completed

Cleaned raw dataset — null handling, outlier removal, encoding. Created visualization charts to highlight churn patterns and produced a simple insight report.
